_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking and internet communications fundamentals (i.e. devices, device configuration, hardware, software, applications, ports/protocols, addressing, network architecture and infrastructure, routing, operating systems, etc.).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-014 (DQ, cosine: 0.448), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.439).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.704). Shared vocabulary: [architecture, fundamentals, knowledge, network, networking, protocols, systems]. DCWF-only terms [addressing, applications, communications, configuration, device, devices] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, balancing, configurations, data, design, dns] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.888, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 24-word DCWF element and 31-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:58.2%, C:41.7%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of networking and internet communications fundamentals (i.e. devices," vs "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.667 ≈ STS 0.704 (gap 0.037). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [architecture, fundamentals, knowledge, network, networking] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.6%. Shared tokens: [architecture, fundamentals, knowledge, network, networking, protocols, systems]. DCWF-only: [addressing, applications, communications, configuration, device, devices]. WIDAI-only: [affects, balancing, configurations, data, design, dns].
